creator: ndowens04@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to D'Arcy J.M. Cain from comment #0)
All you need to do is edit the port's Makefile and put in your email address in place of ports@freeebsd.org and attach it to this bug. Also change title of this bug to something like:
devel/generate: Take MAINTAINER'ship

If you update it to a newer version put Update to x.x.x.x; before Take MAINTAINER'ship
